# Luca Fregoso

> Developer Programs & Content Lead and Technical Presales at Codemotion.
> Fifteen years as a full-stack developer, now leading content and speaker
> curation for Europe's developer conferences and defining technical solutions
> with enterprise clients. Bilingual (Italian/English), Italy,
> open to full-remote roles internationally.

## About
- Leads content, speaker curation (CFP) and technical presales at Codemotion.
- Curates ~90-session agendas from ~600 proposals per edition across Rome,
  Madrid and Milan, for audiences of 2,000-3,000 developers.
- Built a technical academy from zero (~200 people trained) at HRM Group.
- Experienced MC at European developer events (DevFest, Cloud Native Days, etc.).

## Links
- Website (English): https://luca-fregoso.me/
- Sito web (Italiano): https://luca-fregoso.me/it/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucafregoso
- Speaker profile (Sessionize): https://sessionize.com/luca-fregoso/
- Writing (Codemotion Magazine): https://www.codemotion.com/magazine/it/author/luca-fregoso/
